rulings.Case Title: ROBERT ROWE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 2, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT BEAULIEU OF AMERICA, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for summary judgment denied. Triable issue of fact raised whether plaintiff exposed to asbestos in Fix-All purchased from defendant. All parties objections overruled except defendant's objection to Dowmen's responses to interrogatories. Prior testimony admissible as declaration in oppositon to summary judgment motion. (Williams vs. Saga Enterprises, Inc. (1990) 225 Cal.App.3d 142, 149, FN 3.) Court adopts plaintiff's proposed order. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL KUTE VS. ISSA MICHAEL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order To Set Aside And Vacate Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 2, 2009, line 2, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL KUTE Notice Of Motion For Order To Set Aside And Vacate Dismissal. Continued to December 17, 2009 per amended notice of motion. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: LESLIE C MCWHIRTER VS. STEVEN A FABBRO
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 2, 2009, line 3, DEFENDANT STEVEN FABBRO DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to November 20, 2009. Opposing party to provide courtesy copy of opposition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN REALTY, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 2, 2009, line 4, Order to show cause re: preliminary injunction. Motion denied. Plaintiff is unlikely to prevail on the merits. No evidence presented that defendant breached its loan agreement, or that defendant breached the covenant of good faith and fair dealing, or tht defendant engaged in unfair business practices, or committed fraud. Plaintiff has failed to follow through on a trial plan agreement or make any further payments on the loan. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN A RUSSO VS. JOEL DICHTER et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 2, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANTS KATHRYN DIEMER, AND, DIEMER, WHITMAN & CARDOSI, LLP DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off Calendar. Amended Complaint filed. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: B.P.M.P. FAMILY PARTNERS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA VS. NORM HUNTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration, Stay Litigation And Award Attorneys' Fees
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 2, 2009, line 6, PLAINTIFF B.P.M.P. FAIMLY PARTNERS, LLC, Motion To Compel Arbitration, Stay Litigation And Award Attorneys' Fees. Motion to compel arbitration and stay litigation granted pursuant to counsels' agreement. Stay of litigation will commence upon resolution of the pending attachment motion. Motion for attorney fees denied. Plaintiff filed its motion prematurely in view of attorney's correspondence. No showing that attorney fees necessary or reasonable. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: AMERICAN HOME MORTGAGE SERVICING, INC. VS. GENEVIEVE BAYAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 2, 2009, line 12, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HOME MORTGAGE SERVICING, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Hearing required. Plaintiff to bring a copy of its separate statement of undisputed material facts and supporting evidence to the hearing. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ZHEN ZHUO PENG et al VS. DONALD PLANSKY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 2, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANT DONALD PLANSKY Motion For Attorney's Fees And Costs. Motion for attorney fees and costs granted. Work performed reasonable and necessary. $275.00 hourly fee reasonable rate for work performed in this case. Court approves lodestar amount of $8,167.50 plus $49.50 costs for a total amount of $8,217.00. =(302/CWW)
